entry.title: RES26-163 (Honolulu): INTRO → PSE
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF A 4.5’ x 3’ FRAMED “KOʻOLAU SHADOWS” GICLEE PRINT BY GARY REED, VALUED AT $3,000, TO THE CITY FROM LAURIE P. THORNLEY TO BE DISPLAYED AT THE HOʻOMALUHIA BOTANICAL GARDEN, PAUL R. WEISSICH EDUCATION CENTER.

Status: INTRO → PSE

Latest action: CR-214(26) Reported out for adoption as amended in CD1 form.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-163 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF A 4.5’ x 3’ FRAMED “KOʻOLAU SHADOWS” GICLEE PRINT BY GARY REED, VALUED AT $3,000, TO THE CITY FROM LAURIE P. THORNLEY TO BE DISPLAYED AT THE HOʻOMALUHIA BOTANICAL GARDEN, PAUL R. WEISSICH EDUCATION CENTER.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
